description:
Offered: Fall
This course is designed to provide students with an overview of the Psychological Science major, skills and resources needed to be successful within the major/career, and career options for majors. Topics will include the Psychological Science major requirements, critical and scientific thinking, locating and interpreting scientific sources of information, scientific writing and APA-style, ethics and professionalism, subfields and career opportunities in psychology, and developing a career plan.
Note: Restricted to Psychological Science majors only.
